response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the first song as "ハレル!" by Creepy Nuts via on-screen credits. Searched for lyrics using '"ハレル!" Creepy Nuts lyrics'. 2. Identified the second song as "おだまよメドレー" via on-screen text. Determined it is a custom medley by the creator Odamayo and thus has no official unified lyrics, so set lyrics to null.
response.global_summary: A 3D live concert performance featuring VTuber Todoroki Hajime, with an appearance by Hakos Baelz. The performance consists of a song by Creepy Nuts and a custom medley produced by Odamayo.

scenes.description: Todoroki Hajime and Hakos Baelz perform the song "Hareru!".
